accent_strategy.description: One premium vermilion signal held high as the final unresolved warning.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A clean blue field on the right giving the closing frame severe editorial calm.

historical_anchor.description: A simplified launch totem carrying the thesis that small normalized failures scale into catastrophe.

final.negative_prompt: high detail, texture, noise, photoreal clutter, multiple subjects, complex background, dramatic lighting, motion blur, busy composition, ornate realism, dense foliage detail, complex sky, center-weighted composition, symmetrical layout, multiple bright accents, text, watermark, logo, ui overlay
final.prompt: Minimal surreal editorial composition. Quiet, reduced, asymmetrical image with one subtle breach in reality and high thumbnail clarity. The frame should feel paused, suspended, and slightly unresolved. The historical subject must remain legible but reduced to an emblematic silhouette. Strip forms to simple silhouettes and essential geometry only. Use one dominant environmental color field and keep every secondary tone muted or neutral. One side must carry the visual weight while the opposite side stays mostly empty. Reserve one saturated accent as a semantic signal rather than decoration. Keep surfaces quiet with only slight painterly bleed at edges. Hold the image in stillness so it feels like a paused system state with implied consequence. Maintain at least 60% negative space with an asymmetrical focal mass. Use no more than 4 colors and only 1 saturated accent. Allow exactly 1 surreal breach and keep everything else coherent. Lighting must remain soft diffuse. Do not include text, logo, ui_artifacts, motion_blur, photoreal_clutter. Editorial finish pass. Keep the scene calm, legible, and emotionally compressed without adding detail. Historical anchor: A simplified launch totem carrying the thesis that small normalized failures scale into catastrophe.. Historical topic: Small causes, massive consequences. Single surreal breach: A contained halo makes the image feel held open just past the point of resolution.. Caption safety: keep the top UI band clear at x=0.00-1.00, y=0.00-0.12 and keep critical subject matter out of the subtitle band at x=0.08-0.92, y=0.74-0.96. Hero subject: A lone launch totem reduced to one stark closing emblem.. Subject archetype: rocket_totem. Dominant mass: A clean blue field on the right giving the closing frame severe editorial calm.. Accent: One premium vermilion signal held high as the final unresolved warning.. Reflection: A soft mirrored base that keeps the lower third clean for subtitle-safe breathing room.. Single subject in mind only; no source references are used. Scene intent: Make the closing frame double as a shorts-cover candidate with broad caption-safe breathing room and strong thumbnail read..
